privacy.name: Privacy
privacy.blurb: The cypherpunk's claim. Where the protocol learns to hold its tongue.

identity.name: Identity
identity.blurb: Names, attestations, sybil-resistance. Who is this Tarnished, and what can they prove?

markets.name: Markets
markets.blurb: Where value changes hands. AMMs, lending, oracles, the moving river of price.

scaling.name: Scaling
scaling.blurb: Climbing spires. Rollups, data, sequencers — every meter of vertical the protocol gains.

consensus.name: Consensus
consensus.blurb: The protocol's pulse. Validators, finality, the slow heartbeat.

cryptography.name: Cryptography
cryptography.blurb: Proofs and primitives. The mathematics underwriting every claim.

builders-craft.name: Builders' Craft
builders-craft.blurb: The smith's tools. Solidity, EVM, audits, fuzzers, every trick a Tarnished learns at the forge.

governance.name: Governance
governance.blurb: The assembly's labor. DAOs, public goods, voting — the Tarnished collectively.

ai-agents.name: AI & Agents
ai-agents.blurb: New tongues in the protocol. Onchain LLMs, agent frameworks, TEEs.

real-world.name: The Real World
real-world.blurb: Where the protocol meets the kingdom. RWAs, regulation, the social mass.
